testcase.name: test_qbo_link_ambiguous

failure.message: AssertionError: {'qbo': 'ambiguous'} assert 'ambiguous' in (None, '', 'unknown') + where 'ambiguous' = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf9184c9d3dc0>('qbo') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf9184c9d3dc0> = {'qbo': 'ambiguous'}.get

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter44_onboarding_coach.py:64: in test_qbo_link_ambiguous assert fields.get("qbo") in (None, "", "unknown"), fields E AssertionError: {'qbo': 'ambiguous'} E assert 'ambiguous' in (None, '', 'unknown') E + where 'ambiguous' = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf9184c9d3dc0>('qbo') E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf9184c9d3dc0> = {'qbo': 'ambiguous'}.get
